headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics names new head of renewable storage division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head signals a strategic focus on renewable storage, though the immediate financial impact is neutral.

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected CEO departure creates significant leadership instability and uncertainty regarding future strategic direction.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
